blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: The call was to a loan shark. Man named Price. Marcus was negotiating on behalf of one of the group — a debt situation. Price has an alibi.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: So the external thread is closing.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: Which means it's one of the five.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: He sees it. He just needed Price to close first before he could commit to looking inside the house. He's thorough. It's a good quality.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I need more before I say it out loud. Saying it out loud makes it real and real has consequences.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: You've never cared about consequences before.
She was quiet for a moment.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: The tox screen. And one more thing I don't have yet.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I'll know it when it comes.
